name: Maple Glazed Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cover the ribs with water. Bring to a simmer and cook, covered, for about 1 hour or until tender. Drain and place in a shallow dish.
2. In a small saucepan, combine remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil. Pour over ribs and marinate in the refrigerator for about 2 hours.
3. Remove ribs, reserving marinade. Cook over medium-hot coals or on medium setting on gas, turning occasionally and brushing with sauce, for about 20 minutes or until tender and glazed. Cut into single-serving pieces.
